parameters.query: SELECT c.url, c.content, c.created_at FROM pa.content_urls_joep c LEFT JOIN pa.link_validation_results v ON c.url = v.content_url WHERE v.content_url IS NULL AND c.content IS NOT NULL LIMIT 500

INSERT INTO pa.content_history (url, content, reset_reason, reset_details, original_created_at, reset_at) SELECT url, content, 'gone_products', '{{ $json.brokenLinkDetails }}'::jsonb, created_at, NOW() FROM pa.content_urls_joep WHERE url = '{{ $json.contentUrl }}'
INSERT INTO pa.jvs_seo_werkvoorraad (url, kopteksten) VALUES ('{{ $json.contentUrl }}', 0) ON CONFLICT (url) DO UPDATE SET kopteksten = 0
UPDATE pa.content_urls_joep SET content = '{{ $json.correctedContent }}' WHERE url = '{{ $json.contentUrl }}'

INSERT INTO pa.link_validation_results (content_url, total_links, broken_links, valid_links, broken_link_details, validated_at) VALUES ('{{ $json.contentUrl }}', {{ $json.totalLinks }}, {{ $json.goneCount }}, {{ $json.validCount }}, '{{ $json.brokenLinkDetails }}'::jsonb, NOW())
